parameters.url: ={{(() => { const base = $env.CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL || $env.CONVEX_URL || $env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL; if (!base) { throw new Error('Missing Convex URL env: CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL or CONVEX_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL'); } return String(base).replace(/\/$/, '').replace(/\.convex\.cloud(?=\/|$)/, '.convex.site'); })() + '/http/session-load'}}

parameters.replyMarkup: ={{ $item(0).$node['Validation'].json.resolver_output?.result_type === 'exchange_offer' ? { inline_keyboard: [ [ { text: 'Confirm Exchange', callback_data: 'confirm_exchange' }, { text: 'Cancel', callback_data: 'cancel_exchange' } ] ] } : null }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview',
  temperature: 0,
  response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
  messages: [
    { role: 'system', content: "You are a neutral conversational function classifier for a Telegram phone sales bot.\\\
Your only job is to understand the real meaning and conversational act of the current customer message in full context.\\\
\\\
Return ONLY valid JSON. No explanation. No extra text.\\\
\\\
Classify every message by its true conversational function first, then by business intent.\\\
\\\
Allowed message_function (choose exactly one):\\\
- info_request ? asking for store info, location, address, hours, delivery, warranty, payment, contact\\\
- refinement ? adding or changing a detail to an existing conversation (e.g. 128gb, the second one, cheaper)\\\
- negotiation ? trying to reduce price, last price, discount, \"a bit lower\", tnsh yekanesal, wagaw tnsh, ????, ???\\\
- acknowledgment ? simple thanks, okay, greeting, light social reply\\\
- clarification ? message is unclear, incomplete, or needs more info\\\
- fresh_request ? completely new business request with no previous context\\\
\\\
Rules:\\\
- Prioritize semantic meaning and full session context over literal words.\\\
- For Amharic and mixed-language messages, focus on real intent, not surface politeness.\\\
- Never classify negotiation or pricing messages as acknowledgment.\\\
- Never default to product_search or fresh_request when the message is clearly something else.\\\
- If the message is ambiguous or noisy, set message_function = clarification, confidence low, ambiguity high.\\\
- Use session history only to resolve references (that one, cheaper one, 128gb), never to force a sales topic.\\\
\\\
Output exactly this schema and nothing else:\\\
\\\
{\\\
  \"message_function\": \"info_request\" | \"refinement\" | \"negotiation\" | \"acknowledgment\" | \"clarification\" | \"fresh_request\",\\\
  \"business_intent\": \"store_info\" | \"product_search\" | \"pricing\" | \"exchange\" | \"support\" | null,\\\
  \"topic\": \"store_info\" | \"product\" | \"exchange\" | \"pricing\" | \"location\" | null,\\\
  \"confidence\": 0.0,\\\
  \"ambiguity\": 0.0,\\\
  \"missing_information\": [],\\\
  \"reference_resolution\": {\"refers_to\": null, \"resolved_id\": null},\\\
  \"last_asked_key\": null\\\
}" },
    {
      role: 'user',
      content: JSON.stringify({
        customer_text: $json.event?.text ?? '',
        event: {
          event_type: $json.event?.event_type ?? null,
          deep_link: $json.event?.deep_link ?? null,
        },
        session_context: {
          current_topic: $json.session?.conversation_state?.current_topic ?? null,
          current_flow: $json.session?.conversation_state?.current_flow ?? null,
          is_active: $json.session?.conversation_state?.is_active ?? true,
          collected_constraints: $json.session?.collected_constraints ?? {
            budget_etb: null,
            brand: null,
            model: null,
            storage: null,
            condition: null,
          },
          last_asked_key: $json.session?.last_asked_key ?? null,
          current_interest: $json.session?.flow_context?.buy_flow?.current_interest ?? null,
          shown_products: Array.isArray($json.session?.flow_context?.buy_flow?.shown_products)
            ? $json.session.flow_context.buy_flow.shown_products.slice(0, 5)
            : [],
          last_messages: Array.isArray($json.session?.conversation_history)
            ? $json.session.conversation_history.slice(-6)
            : [],
        },
        client_config: $json.client_config ?? null,
      }),
    },
  ],
}) }}

parameters.url: ={{(() => { const base = $env.CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL || $env.CONVEX_URL || $env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL; if (!base) { throw new Error('Missing Convex URL env: CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL or CONVEX_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL'); } return String(base).replace(/\/$/, '').replace(/\.convex\.cloud(?=\/|$)/, '.convex.site'); })() + '/http/session-save'}}
